title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge to potential nationalisation
description: The BBC understands creditors would would pursue payment in full of the outstanding debts, in the multi-billions of pounds.
content:
The lenders to Thames Water are preparing a legal challenge in case a Burnham-led government attempts to nationalise the UK's biggest water company.
Burnham - who takes over as PM on Monday - has previously said he wants to see "greater public contro... [3680 chars]

title: The Open 2026: Ryan Fox wins first major title after keeping cool in Birkdale heat
description: Ryan Fox wins the Open Championship - his first major title - with his final putt on a record-breaking weekend at Royal Birkdale.

title: Fire crews 'surround' large-scale Cairngorms wildfire
description: Residents and campers were allowed to return to the affected area and collect personal belongings on Sunday.
content:
Fire crews have "surrounded" a large-scale wildfire in the Cairngorms after several days of tackling the blaze.
Residents were evacuated from the area while more than 100 firefighters battled to contain and extinguish the fire, which started near Ryv... [1580 chars]
